properties.name: Feature: 2E Fractional Ability Scores
properties.author: Kerry Harrison (sirkerry)
properties.description: Extends every ability score (Str, Dex, Con, Int, Wis, Cha) with a HackMaster-style fractional bracket: each whole score 1-25 gets an XX/01-50 and XX/51-00 row driven by the existing percentile roll, instead of stock 2E's Strength-only, score-18-only exceptional strength rule.

announcement.text: 2E Fractional Ability Scores - Version 1.0 by sirkerry
